LightningComponentBundle.description: Hosts ui for application checklist items

property.label: Title
property.name: pageTitle
property.description: Texts shown as the page header

property.label: Subtitle
property.name: pageSubTitle
property.description: Texts shown as the page sub header

property.label: Application Id
property.name: applicationId
property.description: Record Id of the parent application of the checklist items that needs to be shown
